use_cases: Floating social media dock for linking profiles in website footers or sidebars
Contact dock providing quick access to email and social platforms
Personal portfolio navigation for connecting with audiences across platforms
Developer profile dock for showcasing GitHub, LinkedIn, and other professional links
Creative agency toolbar for client engagement on social channels
ai_summary: A magnetic social media dock component featuring animated SVG icons (GitHub, LinkedIn, Twitter, Mail) that respond to cursor proximity with smooth Framer Motion animations. The component uses a shared MouseContext to track position across dock items, creating an engaging magnetic attraction effect on hover. Perfect for website footers, portfolios, or as a floating navigation element for social profile links.
